ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or city council that took the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "related_meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related meeting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_related_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee or city council */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee or city council */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee or city council */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the committee was founded */,
  "last_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last meeting */,
  "next_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the next meeting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the committee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the committee */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or city council that held the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting's agenda */,
  "minutes_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting's minutes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the meeting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_agenda_id FOREIGN KEY ("agenda_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_minutes_id FOREIGN KEY ("minutes_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_details" (
  "meeting_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting detail */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detail of the meeting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the meeting detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_details_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_details" (
  "action_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action detail */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detail of the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_details_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., committee member, city council member, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchers" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the action or meeting */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action being watched */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting being watched */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watch was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action the document is related to */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the document is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
